description: RIA (SEC- and state-registered investment advisers) compliance ruleset for WRI v1. Source citations live in rules.md; machine-readable rules in rules.json. Authored from PRD §5 + §18.2.
notes: DRAFT — not approved. Per PRD §5.7, do not set approved:true or use in generation until two people are recorded in review.reviewers and the citation URLs are verified by counsel. State overlays for the top-10 states by RIA count (CA, NY, TX, FL, IL, PA, NJ, MA, GA, OH) are present as drafts; their state-specific specifics still require counsel verification before publish.
